description: Gap-fill continuation scanner with volume confirmation. 5-factor screen: gap >=1.5%, vol >=1.5x 20d avg, trend aligned, fill 30-80%, no earnings within 3d. Generates LONG/SHORT continuation tickets, 1-3 day hold. Edge basis: Gao-Han-Li-Zhou 2018 (~64% hit / +1.8% drift). Daily 14:30 UTC.

eventbridge_scheduler.description: Gap-fill continuation scanner daily 14:30 UTC (US open + 90min)
